PiperOrigin-RevId: 232546019
Update WORKSPACE file to be in sync with tensorflow/ changes.
Update tensorflow (fixes TF build with newer version of bazel).

Checking in new sub-directory "CodeBreeder"
Reverting to non-bazel build for now.

Update fold submodule

Everything under deepmath should now build and pass tests, except
on Mac where fold is still broken.

Update tensorflow submodule

This is necessary for deepmath/guidance to build.  Unfortunately, fold
also needs an update, which will come separately.

Move more proof guidance code to deepmath

Some of the premise selection models move over too, since guidance shares some
code with these.

Miscellaneous cleanup included.

PiperOrigin-RevId: 151132065
Add third_party stubs for numpy and scipy

Move Richard's tree generation code to deepmath

Fix some Python 3 issues in the process.

Merge pull request #12 from girving/export

Export changes from piper

Merge changes from Google

A model_utils_test using fold crashes in a horrible way, but I want
to get this merge commit through anyways.

Merge pull request #11 from girving/fix-build

Fix open source build and restructure slightly

Move all deepmath code into deepmath/deepmath

This structure mimics tensorflow and the other repositories which
include tensorflow.  As a benefit, one can do

    bazel test deepmath/...

without pulling in all the TensorFlow tests.

Fix open source build

Also add a check_futures_test analogous to tensorflow's.

Fix imports for Github export

This is necessary to make the copybara transforms invertible.

PiperOrigin-RevId: 147876249

Add a small parser for HOLStep terms

HOLStep terms are fully parenthesized and have plentiful whitespace, so they're
easy to parse in pure Python.
